[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1111111 a
2 1111111 a
3 1101110 5
4 0111111 6
5 1111111 a
6 1110100 4
7 1111111 a

01 10 0111011 5
12 21 1111111 a match 0 1 2 5 7
23 32 1000110 3
34 43 1110110 5
45 54 1110101 5
56 65 1110101 5
67 76 1010111 5
70 07 1010011 4

02 20 1000100 2
13 31 1111111 a match 0 1 2 5 7
24 42 1110100 4 match 6
35 53 1110111 6
46 64 1110101 5
57 75 1110111 6
60 06 1010101 4
71 17 1111011 6

03 30 1000110 3
14 41 0111011 5
25 52 1110101 5
36 63 1010111 5
47 74 1110011 5
50 05 1110101 5
61 16 1111111 a match 0 1 2 5 7
72 27 1010111 5

04 40 0110000 2
15 51 1111111 a match 0 1 2 5 7
26 62 1010101 4
37 73 1010111 5
[completion]
